plugins.name: meta-ads
plugins.description: Meta paid advertising audit & optimization skill conforming to the Agent Skills open standard. 130+ checks for Facebook, Instagram, Reels, Threads, Messenger & Audience Network under Advantage+ / Andromeda / GEM / Lattice. 15 sub-skills, 9 parallel agents, 12 industry templates, Pixel/CAPI + EMQ deep dives, Conversions API server-side tracking, AI creative generation, PPC math, A/B test design, PDF reports, pytest eval harness.
